description: Connect due DiscoveryProgram execution to one idempotent Oban worker invoked through an intent-named Ash interface. Model run lifecycle as durable Ash-owned state with queued/running/completed/partial_failure/failed outcomes, query provenance, cost, candidate counts, program-source linkage, idempotency key, attempt history, and terminal diagnostics; do not hide authoritative run state in ad hoc program metadata. Recover abandoned work and avoid duplicate candidates/findings on retry. Acceptance: scheduled and manual runs share one code interface, worker tests cover enqueue/perform/retry, and run/attention surfaces load state through Ash reads.
title: Run Exa discovery programs durably through Oban
